title: trifolium egrissicum
intro: Trifolium egrissicum, also known as Egrisa Clover, is a species of perennial herb in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Trifolium egrissicum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as pain relief and improved digestion. Trifolium egrissicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
